metadata.title: Lab Notebook
metadata.description: AI-assisted lab notebook for recording and analyzing experiments

list.title: My Lab Notebooks
list.description: Record hypotheses, methods, data, and conclusions for your experiments
list.empty: No draft notebooks yet. Create one to record observations now, then edit, complete, and export it later.

placeholders.hypothesis: What do you predict will happen? What variables are you testing?
placeholders.method: Describe your materials, procedure steps, and safety notes...
placeholders.data: Record your measurements, observations, and data tables...
placeholders.analysis: What patterns do you see? How does the data relate to your hypothesis?
placeholders.conclusion: What did you learn? Was your hypothesis supported? What sources of error exist?

ai.prefill_description: Let AI generate Method and Data templates based on your experiment
ai.suggestions_description: Guiding questions to help your thinking

versions.title: Version History
versions.pro_only: Version history is available for Pro users

errors.quota_exceeded: Monthly notebook limit reached. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited notebooks.
